description: I do not have to move between several applications to advance in the creation of projects and my work is more organized having all the information in one place
author: Thomas C.
pros: This platform makes performance more effective by having visibility of all projects in one place and seeing their progress in real time. It made me replace several applications because Birdview had everything I needed. It makes me focus all the information on the same platform, having a more effective exchange of knowledge with my work team.
cons: I approve that the entire operation of Birdview is effective and of great value for performance and teamwork

description: I like birdview. This is the third project management software we have used at my place of work and overall I am satisfied with its easy to use interface, and sorting and reporting features
author: Stephen B.
pros: Hours tracking and project milestones. The gantt charts are a great tool.
cons: Project tracking with teams gets combersome as more and more projects are added. There doesn't seem to be a great way to organize the projects for quick and easy views.

review_title: Birdview, the start of a journey
description: Overall it's a good experience. Runs smoothly. Allows me to keep track of my work more easily. There a few feature that I haven't used yet such as time tracking or the agenda but once I'm more comfortable I plan on using them.
author: Pierre-Richard A.
pros: The information is centralized and there different views option. We also have the a more concrete view of the time line for project and the steps in each projects. It runs smoothly and it's easy to re-access without having to enter your un/pw every time.
cons: I can't look at several "space" without opening a new window/tab and log in to Birdview. No enough customization in regards to the view (i.e. the detail window is too small, etc.) or the click (i.e. right click to show options, double click to show details, etc.). Lack of personalization in the notification.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best Time Tracking Tool I’ve Ever Seen
description: As a QA who uses Birdview every day to track my time, my overall experience has been quite helpful. I rely on it to log my hours spent on testing and bug tracking, which keeps my workday organized and ensures accurate time reporting. The tool’s daily tracking feature is a big plus, making it easy to monitor my progress. However, I sometimes find the interface a bit overwhelming with extra features I don’t need, and occasional slowdowns can be frustrating. Still, it’s a reliable choice for managing my QA tasks effectively.
author: Maksim L.
pros: I really enjoyed the intuitive interface of Birdview, which made navigation a breeze. The high-quality visuals and detailed features provided an excellent user experience, especially for planning and organizing tasks. The customization options were also a big plus, allowing me to tailor it to my specific needs. Overall, it’s a highly effective tool that enhances productivity with its sleek design and functionality.
cons: As a QA using Birdview for time tracking and task management, my experience has been quite efficient. The tool made it easy to log my hours accurately, ensuring I could track time spent on testing and bug reporting without hassle. I appreciated how straightforward it was to mark tasks as complete, giving me a clear overview of my progress. However, I sometimes found the interface a bit cluttered for my simple needs, and I wished for more QA-specific features like integration with testing tools. Overall, it streamlined my workflow effectively.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Happy with the protection and peace that birdview gives me!
description: I satisfied with birdview. It is easy to use and it brings me peace in my daily work.
author: Lasse G.
pros: That I can quickly enter my hours, but also get a grip on my planning. I can protect myself from doing too much.
cons: Sometimes it seems a bit difficult to understand what my status is. It would be nice to have a good individual overview screen in which I can see the most relevant information quickly. It would also be nice to add a progress bar to the activity centre in which I directly can see what activities go over budget.

review_title: Best PPM tool I've worked with
description: I've built new PMOs with this tool. The process was simple, yet robust. The processes and workflows are easy to build, simple to maintain, and allow for easy scalability. Birdview offers just about everything a mature PMO would need without functionality that will likely never be needed, but other tools charge for. It really is the sweet spot of PPM tools.
author: Kevin D.
pros: The interface is very intuitive, and the tool has a very quick learning curve. It is very scalable and easily customized. The Table, Gantt, and Kanban Board views are great. Creating dependencies is super easy and overall administration is simple.
cons: Dashboards would benefit from more visualizations.

description: Birdview is a project management tool that helps teams plan projects, track time, manage resources, and see progress through clear dashboards.
author: Laili Q.
pros: Clarity and Simplicity - Menus and pathways should be intuitive, with clear labels and logical groupings. Avoid overwhelming users with too many options at once. Use consistent placement of navigation elements (e.g., top bar, side menu).
cons: Limited Adaptability -No personalization for different learning styles or skill levels. Beginners feel overwhelmed, while advanced users feel restricted.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I've worked with a lot of PM management tools and Birdview has been, by far, the easiest to work with.
author: Aaron H.
pros: ORGANIZATION! I keep Birdview open daily to ensure I am staying on track with all my tasks. It's a beautiful thing when you close out the final task and the project simply disappears. Satisfies my urge to check off todo items!
cons: The extra added to add time is a little annoying. Not sure why this was updated. I thought it worked fine the way it was.

review_title: Built for increased productivity and improved collaboration.
description: Saves time on routine tasks. Easy to use and customize.
author: Amed A.
pros: Project plan and task schedule tracking can be accessed through Gantt charts clearly showing any deviations between planned and actual progress.
cons: I spent a bit more time getting it ready for my users. I feel that implementation was long and tedious.

description: Better than some software I have used, but could still use some tweaking, especially the App.
author: James S.
pros: It provides a great visual representation of the various projects in work. The time log is easy to understand as well.
cons: (Android App) - Messages and assignments seem to be very slow to arrive - hours or more is typical. My Work Group backs up most messages and assignments with TEAMS messages "just to be sure" they get through.

review_title: A Vital Platform Birdview for Project Management and Collaboration
description: It has become an integral part of my work life and is my go-to platform. I use it to find my current projects, track their progress, and prioritize tasks based on timelines. It also enables seamless collaboration with different teams on various projects.
author: Pulkit K.
pros: It's a great platform for organizational management that enables our teams to collaborate effectively on projects. The processes within the platform are automated, which helps us track progress at any given point in time. Its user-friendly interface makes it easy to use and ensures that everyone can stay updated and engaged throughout the project lifecycle.
cons: Sometimes, it can be difficult to track down old closed tasks, especially since there are multiple projects with similar names. To improve this, it would be helpful to have a sorting option based on the timeline. This would make it easier to locate tasks by their completion date and streamline the search process.

review_title: A view without issue- Bird view
description: i am using it almost daily now, and i am now comfortable using it. i search tasks easily and tag people there without any problem.
author: Divya S.
pros: It is easy to track the tasks, and we can use AI to enhance our comment over there. we able to tag colleagues easily and i have completed my tasks on time referring birdview. Also, there is no glitch in loading the task, its fast and user friendly. A good tool for day-to-day projects and tasks!
cons: i dont like scrolling the tasks, i dont know how it can be improved, or the view can build different but if i am having multiple projects it is a huge bulk. rest all good.

review_title: Intuitive, Powerful, and a Game-Changer for Our Team
description: Our overall experience with Birdview has been outstanding. From day one, it has simplified complex processes and provided a clear, centralized overview of all our projects. It has become an indispensable tool for us, boosting productivity and making collaboration seamless. The value for money is exceptional, and I would highly recommend it to any organization looking to improve its project and workflow management.
author: fredrick S.
pros: What I like most about Birdview is its incredible ease of use. The interface is clean and intuitive, which allowed our team to get up and running in no time with minimal training. It has streamlined our entire workflow through powerful process automation and has significantly improved our team collaboration. Everything is in one place, which makes organizational management a breeze.
cons: Honestly, it's difficult to find something to dislike. If I had to suggest an improvement, it would be to add even more granular customization options within the reporting dashboards. However, the current reporting capabilities are already quite comprehensive and meet almost all of our needs.

author: Ankur K.
pros: Birdview is exceptionally user-friendly and greatly streamlines our communication management, making collaboration more efficient and organized.
cons: There are no cons till now. User friendly and great features like notification and today's tasks can we found easily.

description: 10/10, would use this again. The software makes it easy to stay on top of many projects at once, share files, assign different memebers.
author: Sachin K.
pros: Easy to use, very intuitive. Easy to track progress of projects and organize them in a format to stay on top of all of them.
cons: Wish it could be integrated into other software. Wish there was a way to give guest viewing so a customer could see the project status.

review_title: Smooth and Reliable Platform with Room for AI Improvement .
description: Overall, my experience with Birdview has been positive. The system is fast, reliable, and user-friendly, making daily tasks much easier. However, with some refinement to the AI feature, it could become even more efficient and seamless.
author: Vardeep S.
pros: I really liked how smooth and responsive Birdview is. It runs without any lag, and the notification system works efficiently, keeping me updated in real time.
cons: The AI feature needs improvement. It’s not very convenient to use right now, especially since it doesn’t always replace the words when I ask it to.

description: I like how I can click on any task and see when it was completed, who worked on it, and also to see the other tasks related to it. I don't use it for reports, but our management team can use it to run reports to get data.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: We manage many different tasks for multiple projects. It's great to be able to see all the subtasks associated with each main task, and to see which ones have been completed.
cons: It took a while for me to understand how to use it effectively. We have so many tasks and projects and I was overwhelmed at first. But now I know how to use it to get the information I need.

description: Very pleasant and intuitive as i said before. The change to birdview was a breathe in terms of the registration of our working our, making everything simplier and visual.
author: Fabián M.
pros: I like the way you can make the worked hours register. It's very simple and intuitive, specially in comparition to the previous plataform i used to use in my working place.
cons: Not much. For the use i give to it, everything has worked just perfect. Maybe, an improve i'd make would be remove the restriction to the worker, that's because sometimes we have to exchange uneeded messages with my PM.

author: Auke V.
pros: I like the simplicity and ease of use. It enables project organizing and planning all in one piece of software.
cons: The UI: small detail but in order to expand a project, task, request etc, you need to click the details button instead of just clicking on the text itself. This takes time and is a minor annoyance.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: amina B.
pros: Birdview has transformed how our team manages projects. The platform gives us clear visibility, better collaboration, and keeps everyone aligned. It’s intuitive, efficient, and saves us time every week. Highly recommend it for any results-driven team
cons: "Birdview offers potential, but the learning curve is steep and the interface feels overwhelming. Customization is limited, and performance lags on larger projects. Mobile functionality is underwhelming. It’s not the best fit for fast-paced or highly specialized teams.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Amin M.
pros: One of the key advantages of Birdview is its ability to provide a clear, centralized overview of complex projects, which is essential for efficient project management.
cons: One of the main drawbacks of Birdview is that its extensive range of features can be overwhelming for new users or small teams who only need basic project management tools.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Has improved over the years. Overall satisfied!
author: Michael L.
pros: Good for high level project management making it easy to track and add team members for accountability.
cons: Would like to link with other tools easier

description: I only use birdview twice a month to submit my timesheet, which is just enough time to forget every functionality I've ever learned and have it be a confusing not fun experience. My experience may be tainted by the fact that it is a timesheet software, which is hard to enjoy...
author: Ryley T.
pros: that you can track notes with time enteries
cons: confusing, clunky, nonhelpful reports, not user-friendly. I wish it had automatic default hours based on your projects/expected load. Instead, you have to re-select every project you work on for each week.

description: Because I am new to the company, and I am getting used to everything that we use, getting a hang of Birdview hasn't taking much time.
author: Thomas B.
pros: I like that everything that I need to accomplish at work is assigned and I add time to these projects for easy usage.
cons: There really isn't anything that I would say is a negative, nor have I found anything that I think is an issue with.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Stephen P.
pros: Great for tracking across multiple projects each with a different level of granularity.
cons: Not a lot missing from the sections of the product I use daily.
